title: nephromeria infracta
intro: Nephromeria infracta, also known as the "Fringed Nephromeria" or "Fringed Tree Nephromeria", is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Lamiaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Nephromeria infracta include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and aid in digestion, making it a popular herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Nephromeria infracta typically involve making a tea from the leaves or roots, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
